snippet.title: @SaiAbhyankkar - Pavazha Malli (Music Video) | Kayadu | Shruti Haasan | Vivek | Thejo | Think Indie
snippet.description:
Here's the Music Video of "Pavazha Malli", Sung by @SaiAbhyankkar & Shruti Haasan, Lyrics Written by Vivek, Music Composed by @SaiAbhyankkar

Song Credits:

Song Name : Pavazha Malli 
Composed, Sung & Produced  : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Singers : @SaiAbhyankkar, Shruti Haasan 
Lyrics : Vivek 
Additional Vocals : Sanjana Kalmanje, Vaimu, Arjun, Elisa ,Shiva 
Synth & Keys : @SaiAbhyankkar   
Rhythm Produced by @SaiAbhyankkar 
Ethnic Percussions : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Kumbaaara Rhythms : Yanka Percussion Group  
Choir : The Indian Choral Ensemble (Chamber) 
Singers : Sushmita Narasimhan, Aparna Harikumar, Sivaranjini Chandramouli, Bavathayini Nagarajan, Sudharsan Hemaram, Shibi Srinivasan, Manikandan Chembai 
Choir Directors:  Kalyani Nair, Karthik Manickavasakam  
Chorus Recorded at 2BarQ Studios by Rajesh kannan 
Bass : Derick Mcarthur, Keba Jeremiah 
Accoustic & Electric Guitars : Keba Jeremiah 
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan 
Additional Guitar : Godfray Immanuel  
Tavil : Prasanth, Saravanan  
Nadaswaram : Parthiban 
Flute : Lalith Talluri 
Saxophone : Basanth Muralikrishnan 
Violin : Sivateja Mallajosyula 
Traditional Stringed Instruments : Tapas Roy 
Recorded at Neo Sound Studio, Mumbai by Pranjal Borah 
Studio Operation Head : Rajesh kannan 
Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna  
All Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai 
Sound Engineers : Rajesh Kannan, Abin Ponnachan 
Sound Design : A.M.Senthamizhan
Mixed by @SaiAbhyankkar at Yolo Rechords 
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Yolo Rechords

Video Credits:

Director : Thejo Bharathwaj 
DOP : Niketh bommi 
Editing & VFX : Viky Pup
Production Designer : Latha Sudan 
Choreographer : M. Sherif 
Stylist : Shruthi Manjari 
Project Head : Ayush Arvind 
DI : Vineesh Vijayan 
Makeup Artists : Noorjahan & Team 
Kayadu Team : Deepika (Manager ABC Studios), Ravi (Assistant ) 
Kayadu Mua & Hair Stylist : Vaishali, Adithya Jayakumar 
Producer : Thejo Bharathwaj 
Production House : Theepetti Pictures 
Line Producer : R. Vasudevan (Sunflower Entertainment) 
Production Controller : Raghunathan Raju 
1st AD : Ayush Arvind 
Associate Directors : Abishek Shanker & Sidharth Raj 
1st AC & Focus Puller : Yogi Chowdary Kotapati

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer Tease | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer Tease on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

Witness PSPK at his entertaining best in Ustaad Bhagat Singh.

Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive offers, updates & more only on BookMyShow.
Link: https://bookmy.show/UBS-HI 

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailerTease #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers 

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, RaashiiKhanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry
Executive Producers: R Chandrasekhar, Dinesh Narasimhan 
Creative Producer: Harish Pai 
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi 
Costume Designer(Pawan Kalyan): Neeta Lulla
Marketing: First show
PRO: Venu Gopal

snippet.title: IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final
snippet.description:
#livestream #cricketlive #t20worldcup 
#Cricket

Hello and welcome to By The Way Cricket Channel 
Host : Shahid 



Today Topic : IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final

🔴Match :  The Grand Finale: India vs New Zealand
🔴Venue: Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad
🔴Date : 08 MAR 2026
🔴Time: 7:30pm IST


Details about this Match :

Will New Zealand clinch their maiden T20 World Cup title, or will India become the first team to successfully defend the crown and lift the trophy at home? To find out,

Both teams have had different match-winners stepping up at crucial stages of the tournament, which has propelled them into the summit clash. For India, the likes of Ishan Kishan, Jasprit Bumrah, Sanju Samson, Hardik Pandya, Suryakumar Yadav and Shivam Dube have delivered when it mattered the most. New Zealand, meanwhile, have relied on the contributions of Finn Allen, Tim Seifert, Rachin Ravindra and Matt Henry.

The centre pitch is likely to be used for the grand finale. It is expected to be a mixed-soil surface, similar to the one used for the Indian Premier League final in 2025 and different from the pitch that was used during the 2023 ODI World Cup final at this venue.

Topics we are going to Discuss :👉👉
 
Ajj ka match 
By the way 
Shahid Commentary

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

🔥 Turn up the volume and enjoy the vibe of TATEEREE.

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 The Revenge Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Dhurandhar 2 The Revenge Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. Dhurandhar 2 Movie Featuring Ranveer Singh Directed by Aditya Dhar is the Biggest Bollywood Film of 2026 with Never seen before Hype of Bade Sahab in Dhurandhar leading to Historic Advance booking & Breakdown theories from Public Review. Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Review Reaction & Missed Details with Full Movie Expectations would be shared in this Video. Dhurandhar 2 vs Toxic Debate is over or Dhurandhar 2 sets the fire again for the No.1 Film of 2026 in Box Office Collection? Do leave your Comments below.

#Dhurandhar2 #Dhurandhar2Trailer #DhurandharTheRevenge

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Ghut Gu Ghut Gu Boli He Tatiri | Badshah | Sapna Chaudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
#tateereesong​ #tatirisong​ #tateereebadsha​ #haryanvisongsharyanavi​ 

Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree (Official Video) Badshah | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree

Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree (Official Video) Badshah, Simran Jaglan, Hiten | New Song 2026
#newharyanvisong​ 
#badshacontroversy​
#newsong​ #newsong2026​ #haryanvisong​ #newharyanvisong​ #badshah​ 

Singer : Mohini Patel 
Lyrics : Anil Dubetha
Music : Abhi Saini

Lyrics
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree

Aya Badshah doli chadhane
In sabki ghodi banane
Thode pagal thode sayane
Hum aye inke plans ke ghode lagane
Aye ..launde karte bakbak
Hum shatpratishat ye ladke latpat
Puri duniya me dekho karte kartab
Par ish boy delhi hai marte dum tak
Main hi Shawn main hi Wayne
Mai hi scene mai hi game
Mere khoon me hai jeet dekh pass aake pain
Kalakar ka hai brain
Double R ki hai crane
Audemars ka hai time Bulgari ki chain
Insan insane
Mera kaam insane
Do hi dost hai mere
mera pen mera pain meri bandi cocaine
mere gaane propane
mere sar pe hai crown mere mun pe hai fame

Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Kulture King
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Array chora apni aai pe aaya hoya hai
Do das kos se game pe chhaya hoya hai
In gamron ka game bajaya hoya hai
Jo mangvaya hoya hai woh sab laya hoya hai

Yeah… Bin dano ki challi tu bhi nallah teri gang bhi nalli
Tu well connected politically
Mai well connected spiritually
Main stream commercial mein lyrically
Abhi underrated mai criminally
Inki dal nahi galli inki g***e jalli iss sal puri kar dunga tasalli main

Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary
🎤 Singers: Kabir Singhora & Sarita Yadav
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music
🎶 Composer: Himanshu Rajput
🎬 Director: Nicky Singh
 📽 DoP: Munish Sharma
💻 Edit & DI: Sunny Panchal
🖼️ Poster : Vivek Kumar (Climax Studio)
👔 Producer: Shiv Pratap Singh
🏢 Production Manager: Vishu Singhaniya
👥 Casting: Nicky Singh
💄 MakeUp: Vinay Gautam

💃 Supporting Artists: Vandana's Group
🙏 Special Thanks: Vinu Yadav Brajwasi


video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: TORE KE LET RAHIYO (Song): Aashish Yadav | Khushi Kakkar | Neha Singh | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों के लिए पेश है धमाकेदार गाना "तोरे की लेत रहियो (Tore Ke Let Rahiyo)" । इस गाने को अपनी मधुर आवाज़ दी है आशीष यादव और खुशी कक्कड़ ने। शानदार बोल लिखे हैं चिंटू राजा ने और इसका दमदार संगीत तैयार किया है चमन सिंह ने।

#ToreKiLetRahiyo #AashishYadav #khushikakkar 

Credits:
Featuring- Aashish Yadav, Neha Singh
Singers- Aashish Yadav, Khushi Kakkar
Lyrics:- Chintu Raja
Music :- Chaman Singh 
Video Director- Ashish Satyarthi
Project Manager- T-Series- Sonu Srivastava
Post Production- Vicky Ji
Editor- Papu Varama
Di- Rohit Singh
Dop -Rahul Yadav
Choreographer - Aslam Ji


SUBSCRIBE T-Series channel Hamaar Bhojpuri for unlimited entertainment
http://www.youtube.com/hamaarbhojpuri
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/

snippet.description:

Sajid Nadiadwala Presents
A Vishal Bhardwaj Film

"O'Romeo"

Produced By Sajid Nadiadwala 
Directed By Vishal Bhardwaj 
Story: Hussain Zaidi
Screenplay By: Vishal Bhardwaj & Rohan Narula
Dialogues by : Vishal Bhardwaj

Choreographer: Jani Master
Creative Producer: Priti Shahani
Associate Producer: Manuj Mittra

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

bg.title: Minecraft Спийдрънър СРЕЩУ 6-ма Ловци
bg.description:
Minecraft Спийдрънър СРЕЩУ 6-ма Ловци. Вие го поискахте. Продължението на поредицата. Това беше абсолютно лудост.

​Последвайте ме в социалните мрежи:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic
​Мърч: https://dream.shop/

​BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

​Решихме да наречем тази поредица Minecraft Manhunt. Това видео е различен вариант, в който има ШЕСТИМА преследвачи вместо ТРИМА или само един.
​Това е ново „Minecraft, но...“ 1.21.11 предизвикателство, което решихме да изпробваме. Опитвам се да превъртя играта, докато моите приятели George И Sapnap И BadBoyHalo И Antfrost И awesamdude И CaptainPuffy се опитват да ми попречат. Това е състезание, беше супер напрегнато и много се забавлявахме. Обичам да правя тези предизвикателства.

​Ако това видео събере 500 000 харесвания, ще направим реванш!

​Това не е „Minecraft, но водата се покачва“ или „Minecraft, но лавата се покачва“, или което и да е друго подобно предизвикателство. Това е спийдрън / спийдрънър на Minecraft срещу убиец/асасин.

​#MinecraftManhunt

zh.title: 我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人
zh.description:
我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人，你们一直在催的内容来了——这个系列的续作！这一次的对决简直疯狂到离谱。

关注我的社交平台：
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

周边商品：
https://dream.shop/

参与者：
BadBoyHalo @thesaintsofgames
George @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap @Sapnap
Antfrost @Antfrost
awesamdude @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy @CaptainPuffy

我们把这个系列称为 Minecraft Manhunt（我的世界猎人游戏）。不过这一次的版本和以往不同——不是三名猎人，也不是一名猎人，而是整整六名猎人！

这是一次基于 Minecraft 1.21.11 的全新挑战：
我的目标是通关游戏，而我的朋友 George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost、awesamdude 和 CaptainPuffy 的唯一任务，就是不惜一切代价阻止我。这是一场竞速对决，节奏紧张到爆，全程高能，我们也笑个不停。我真的很喜欢做这种挑战。

如果这个视频达到 50 万点赞，我们就来一场复赛！

这不是"Minecraft，但水位上升"或"Minecraft，但岩浆上升"那类“MC但是...挑战”。这是 Minecraft 速通者 vs 猎人/刺客 的极限对抗。

#MinecraftManhunt

it.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cacciatori
it.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cacciatori. Lo avete chiesto. La continuazione della serie. Questo è stato assolutamente pazzesco.

Seguite i miei social:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Abbiamo deciso di chiamare questa serie Minecraft Manhunt. Questo video è una versione diversa, in cui ci sono SEI cacciatori invece di TRE o solo uno.

Questa è una nuova sfida Minecraft Ma, versione 1.21.11, che abbiamo deciso di provare. Io cerco di completare il gioco, mentre il mio amico George, il mio amico Sapnap, il mio amico BadBoyHalo, il mio amico Antfrost, il mio amico awesamdude e la mia amica CaptainPuffy cercano di impedirmi di farlo. È una gara, è super intensa e ci siamo divertiti un sacco. Adoro queste sfide.

Se questo video ottiene 500.000 like, faremo una rivincita!

Non Minecraft, ma Water Rises o Minecraft, ma Lava Rises, o qualsiasi altra sfida simile. Si tratta di una speed run / speed runner di Minecraft contro un killer / assassino.

#MinecraftManhunt

ru.title: Майнкрафт Спидраннер VS 6 Охотников
ru.description:
Майнкрафт Спидраннер VS 6 Охотников. Вы этого просили. Продолжение рубрики. Это было совершенно безумно.

Подпишитесь на мои соцсети:
➽ Твиттер - @Dream
➽ Инстаграм - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Снэпчат - @Dreampublic

Мерч: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Мы решили назвать эту рубрику Майнкрафт Мэнхант. Это видео - другое исполнение этой рубрики, где охотников ШЕСТЕРО вместо ТРЕХ охотников или всего одного.

Это новый Майнкрафт но, 1.21.11 челлендж, который мы решили попробовать. Я пытаюсь пройти игру, пока мой друг Джордж, И мой друг Сапнап, И мой друг БэдБойХэйло, И мой друг Энтфрост, И мой друг awesamdude, И моя подруга КапитанПаффи пытаются меня остановить. Это гонка, и это супер напряженно, и мы много смеялись. Я люблю устраивать эти челленджи.

Если это видео наберет 500 000 лайков, мы устроим рематч!

Не Майнкрафт, Но Вода Поднимается или Майнкрафт, Но Лава Поднимается, или любой другой подобный но челлендж. Это спидран / спидраннер Майнкрафта против убийцы / ассасина

#MinecraftManhunt

tr.title: Minecraft Manhunt VS 6 Avcı
tr.description:
Minecraft Manhunt VS 6 Avcı. Siz istediniz, işte serinin devamı. Bu kesinlikle çılgıncaydı.

Sosyal medya hesaplarımı takip edin:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Ürünler: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

Bu seriye Minecraft Manhunt adını verdik. Bu video, üç avcı veya sadece bir avcı yerine altı avcının olduğu farklı bir versiyonu.

Bu, denemeye karar verdiğimiz yeni bir Minecraft 1.21.11 challenge’ı. Ben oyunu bitirmeye çalışırken, arkadaşım George, arkadaşım Sapnap, arkadaşım BadBoyHalo, arkadaşım Antfrost, arkadaşım awesamdude ve arkadaşım CaptainPuffy beni durdurmaya çalışıyor. Bu bir yarış ve çok heyecanlıydı, çok güldük. Bu tür challenge’ları yapmayı çok seviyorum.

Bu video 500.000 beğeni alırsa, rövanş yapacağız!

Bu Minecraft, Ama Su Yükseliyor veya Minecraft, Ama Lav Yükseliyor challenge’ları gibi değil. Bu, Minecraft’ta yapılan bir speedrun/speedruner ile bir katil/suikastçi arasındaki mücadele.

#MinecraftManhunt

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців
uk.description:
Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців Ви просили. Це продовження серій. Це було абсолютне божевілля.

Слідкуйте за моїми соціальними мережами
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Мерч: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є ШІСТЬ мисливців замість ТРЬОХ або лише одного. 

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.11 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мій друг Джордж і мій друг Сепнеп і мій друг БедБойХало і мій друг Антфрост і мій друг Авсемдуд і моя подруга КапітанПаффі намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами. 

Якщо це відео набере 500,000 лайків ми повторимо матч!

Не Майнкрафт, Але Вода Підіймається або Майнкрафт, Але Лава Підіймається, або будь-який подібний виклик. Це швидкісне проходження / спідранер Майкрафту проти кіллера / вбивці

de.title: Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 6 Jäger
de.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 6 Jäger. Ihr wolltet es. Die Fortsetzung der Serie. Das war absoluter Wahnsinn.

Folge mir auf Social Media:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merchandise: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt SECHS Jäger anstelle von nur DREI Jägern oder nur einem.

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.11, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, während mein Freund George UND mein Freund Sapnap UND mein Freund BadBoyHalo UND mein Freund Antfrost UND mein Freund Awesamdude UND meine Freundin CpatainPuffy versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.

Wenn dieses Video 500.000 Likes bekommt, wird es ein Rematch geben!

Nicht etwa "Minecraft, aber Wasser steigt" oder "Minecraft, aber Lava steigt" oder irgendeine ähnliche "aber" Herausforderung. Dies ist ein Speedrun / Minecraft Speedrunner gegen einen Killer/Assassinen.

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) | Peddi | Ram Charan | Janhvi | Buchi Babu Sana | AR Rahman
snippet.description:
Presenting the energetic Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) from the film Peddi 🎶🔥

Starring global star Ram Charan and the stunning Janhvi Kapoor, this vibrant track brings electrifying visuals and captivating performances.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana and composed by the legendary A. R. Rahman, the song delivers a powerful blend of rhythm, melody, and celebration. 💃🕺

Turn up the volume and feel the festive Telugu vibes!

#RaiRaiRaaRaa #Peddi #RamCharan #JanhviKapoor #ARRahman #BuchiBabuSana #TeluguSongs #Tollywood #NewSong #DanceHit

#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? Aadhe Pe Main So Gai

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya

Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba

Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai

snippet.title: Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song
snippet.description:
Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song

~Credit
Song : Zindagi Ki Talash Mein
Star Cast : Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar, Mohsin Khan, Paresh Rawal, Anupam Kher, Avtar Gill
Singer : Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Bhushan Dua
Lyrics : Sameer

~Lyrics (Zindagi Ki Talash Mein)
Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye

Hum the aise safar pe chale
Jiski koi manzil nahi
Hum ne saari umar jo kiya
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Ik khushi ki talaash main the
Kitne gam humko tadpa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Socho hum kitne mazboor the
Jo na karna tha vo kar gaye
Peechhe mud ke jo dekha zara
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Khudh ke baare main soche jo hum
Apne aap se sharma gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye.

Apne aap se sharma gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye.

snippet.title: रविवार भक्ति | नॉनस्टॉप राम भजन | NonStop Ram Bhajan | Shree Ram Ji Ke Bhajan  | Ram Bhajan | Bhakti
snippet.description:
रविवार भक्ति | नॉनस्टॉप राम भजन | NonStop Ram Bhajan | Ram Ji Ke Bhajan  | Ram Bhajan | Bhakti Song

⭐Song : 
रामा रामा रटते रटते बीती रे उमरिया
राम का नाम जपो सुबह-शाम
तुम उठो सिया श्रृंगार करो
हमारे साथ श्री रघुनाथ 
मेरे मालिक के दरबार 
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी 
कण कण में श्री राम हर मन 
जितना दिया सरकार ने मुझको 
श्री राम जय राम जय जय राम
आरती कीजे श्री राम लला की

⭐Singer : Upasana Mehta & Sanchit
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.title: Rakesh Barot | Sagu Tane Malshe To Sagu Maney Malshe | New Gujarati Sad Song 2026 | Jhankar Music
snippet.description:
Jhankar Music Gujarati Presents Latest Sad Video Song titled "Sagu Tane Malshe To Sagu Maney Malshe" Sung by Rakesh Barot, & Penned by Chandu Raval & Music Composed By Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya, Starring: Rakesh Barot, Vidhi Shah & Director by Chandu Raval
Join this channel :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeljbfXMX_5a2_KMXTkF-A/join

If u lose someone u love the feeling should be like this.

જો તમે કોઈ પ્રિય વ્યક્તિને ગુમાવો છો, તો લાગણી આવી હોવી જોઈએ.

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤 : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/947098038004780/

🎧 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬  
♪ Song : Sagu Tane Malshe To Sagu Maney Malshe
♪ Singer : Rakesh Barot
♪ Lyrics : Chandu Raval
♪ Music : Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya
♪ Studio : R2 Recording Studio - Ahmedabad

🎬 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬
♪ Producer : MAARSS MOVIES AND MUSIC LLP (JHANKAR MUSIC)
♪ Project. Director : Akash Digital - Chandu Raval
♪ Starring : Rakesh Barot, Vidhi Shah
♪ Co.Artist : Bharat Chaudhry, Aayush Singrakhiya
♪ Editing : Ravindara S. Rathod
♪ D.O.P : Chirag Kachariya
♪ Rakesh Barot Costume Designer : Manisha R Barot 
♪ Choreographer : Dipak Turi
♪ Makeup-Hair : Hashmukh Limbachiya
♪ Poster Design : Pradip Karbatiya
♪ Ganre : Gujarati Sad Song
♪ Music Label : Jhankar Music

#rakeshbarot #newgujaratisong #rakeshbarotnewsong #jhankarmusicgujarati 

𝐋𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐝 𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 : 🎶
♪ 𝐈 𝐓𝐮𝐧𝐞𝐬 : https://surl.li/mtbmjw
♪ 𝐉𝐢𝐨 𝐒𝐚𝐚𝐯𝐧 : https://surl.li/kcvpdm
♪ 𝐒𝐩𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐲 : https://surl.li/jabmnk
♪ 𝐆𝐚𝐚𝐧𝐚 : https://surl.li/jabmnk
♪ 𝐀𝐦𝐚𝐳𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/sieeys
♪ 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐓𝐮𝐛𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/yghpjw
♪ 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐑𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 : https://surli.cc/vbwueq
♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/mtbmjw
-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે...(3)
હો અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
હે વાલુ તને મળશે તો વાલુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
તારા જેવુ તને મળશે મારા જેવુ મને મળશે...(૨)
હે પ્રેમ તને મળશે તો પ્રેમ મને મળશે...(૨)
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હો બજાર ના બંગલા વાલા તને લાગ્યા
ઝૂંપડા જોઈ હવે છેટા તમે ભાગ્યા 
હો વધેલા પથરા આવ્યા મારે આડા 
અમારા થઈને અમને ભરમાયા
હો તારા વાળું તે કરી લીધુ અમેં અમારું કરી લેશું...(૨)
હે આજે તુ શે રાજી કાલે અમે રાજી...(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
હો દુનિયા માં કોઈ ના વગર ઊભુ નથી રેતુ 
પોતાના પારકા નથી સેહવાતુ 
હો વાર પછી વારો હઉ નો આવશે
આજ તારી વેળા કાલ અમારી પણ આવશે
હો આજે તુ ઘણી હરખાયશે અમે હરખાશું...(૨)
હે તમે જમો કંસાર અમે છોડશું સંસાર...(૨)
મારે તારા જેવુ ચો થાવુંશે...(૨)
હે મારા દિલ તે બહુ રડાયુશે
-------------------------------
રાકેશ બારોટ ના અન્ય ગીતો નિહાળવા માટે નીચે આપેલી લિંક ક્લિક કરો:👇

1️⃣Saali
https://youtu.be/g3QyZZYLRbw

2️⃣Sajan No Prem
https://youtu.be/Xo4tm0EdXgs

3️⃣Lagan Thai Jya Love Bhuli Jya
https://youtu.be/Mxgw9fwvzac

4️⃣Vavad 
https://youtu.be/zX2EZzUmLtc

5️⃣Vasi Gaya Chho Dalde
https://youtu.be/nCp4LphPIXo

6️⃣Malan
https://youtu.be/gyI9Nx9aPg8

7️⃣Balpan Ni Yaad 
https://youtu.be/OS_XLUfHtCg

8️⃣Sauthi Savayo Maro Pyar
https://youtu.be/VpzIwd_CbLI

9️⃣Tara Vina Hu Koro Kagal
https://youtu.be/4gK-dOBmvoE

🔟Bangadi
https://youtu.be/R7-2z_S2D00
---------------------------
@𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐨𝐧 𝐉𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 𝐆𝐮𝐣𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢 
    𝐒𝐮𝐛𝐬𝐜𝐫𝐢𝐛𝐞 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥▶️
https://www.youtube.com/@jhankarmusicgujarati

𝐄𝐧𝐣𝐨𝐲 & 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐖𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐮𝐬 :
👉𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐓𝐮𝐛𝐞 : https://www.youtube.com/@jhankarmusicgujarati
👉𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐤 : https://www.facebook.com/jhankarmusicgujarati...
👉𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 : https://twitter.com/music_jhankar...
👉𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 : https://www.instagram.com/JhankarMusicGujarati... 
👉𝐒𝐧𝐚𝐩𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐭 : https://www.snapchat.com/add/jhankarmusicguj

✨ About the Video:
🎵 Gujarati Love Song
💞 Theme: Love, Emotions 

🎧 Listen, Feel & Share the Love

If you enjoyed this song, don’t forget to:
👍 Like
💬 Comment your favorite line
🔔 Subscribe for more Love songs

This video is for entertainment purposes only. All characters, visuals, and scenes are fictional and do not represent any real person or event.

snippet.title: The Boys Final Season Trailer Breakdown | Homelander vs Butcher ENDGAME
snippet.description:
The final season of The Boys is almost here and the new trailer just revealed some massive secrets. Homelander wants to become more than powerful… he wants to become a god. Meanwhile Billy Butcher is planning to release a virus that could wipe out every supe on the planet.

In this video we break down the The Boys Season 5 trailer, hidden details, easter eggs, Soldier Boy’s return, the mysterious V1 Compound V, and the upcoming war between Homelander and Butcher.

Will Homelander finally rule the world or will Butcher become an even bigger villain?

Watch till the end for theories and predictions about The Boys Final Season.

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Review | Aditya Dhar & Ranveer Singh Create Pure Madness
snippet.description:
#TheReviewPoint

Dhurandhar The Revenge trailer is finally out and it has completely blown away expectations. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh in dual powerful avatars as Jaskirat Singh Rangi and Hamza Ali Mazari, the trailer promises a massive cinematic spectacle.

The scale, background score, action sequences and intense face-offs make Dhurandhar 2 look like one of the biggest Indian films ever made. With powerhouse actors like R Madhavan, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna and Arjun Rampal joining the cast, the film is set to deliver an explosive big-screen experience.

In this video we break down the Dhurandhar The Revenge trailer, analyse the story hints, discuss Ranveer Singh’s ferocious performance and explain why this film could become a massive box office storm.

Advance bookings have already started trending and many trade analysts are predicting record-breaking numbers on the opening day.

Watch this full breakdown to understand why Dhurandhar 2 could be one of the biggest action spectacles in Indian cinema.

Release Date: 19 March

snippet.description:

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।

snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
About SHINE HUNT :
* On our channel we create а trailer teaser *
Also known as recut trailers, involve collecting multiple pieces of film footage from one or multiple movies A New And Fresh Story, editing them to create a new trailer. Trailer teaser Glimpse are often created for a movie that does not exist now or to change the genre of an existing film..
The trailer mashups are not only a user generated form of digital creativity but a way to create anticipation for future releases, working in tandem with current movie trailers. Movie trailers are designed to give minimal plot detail and to create hype and anticipation. Fan made trailer mashups allow the audience to perform their own cinematic spin on current movie footage. This allows the trailer to focus on a specific actor or portion of the film. It could even change the plot or genre of the film entirely .                                      .----SHINE HUNT CHANNEL----
This video is made only for showcasing the editing skills of the individual.
 

Copyright Notice:-
Please feel free to leave me a notice if you find this upload inappropriate.
Contact me personally if you are against an upload which you may have rights to the images (or) music, instead of contaction YouTube about a copyright infringement... thank you.....!

#Holi2026 #VrindavanJaungi #MereUtheVirahMePeer

“मेरे उठे विरह में पीर” में एक गोपी का हृदय व्यक्त होता है, जो श्याम से बिछड़कर विरह की पीड़ा में तड़प रही है। होली के पावन अवसर पर वह संकल्प लेती है कि वह वृन्दावन जाकर अपने प्रियतम के संग रंग खेलेगी।

snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Unclogging DRAINS to SAVE A CITY from FLOOD!
snippet.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be Unclogging drains to save a city from a huge flood in Drain Sim gameplay. Can I unclog many plugged street drains in this satisfying simulator game before the whole city is flooded? (They gave me a bucket for this) This is Drain Sim the game!

snippet.description:
अमिताभ बच्चन के सदाबहार खुशियों भरे गीत! 🎶

1980 के दशक के सुनहरे दौर से, अमिताभ बच्चन की आवाज़ और अदाकारी से सजे, कुछ ऐसे गाने जो आज भी हमारे दिलों में खुशी भर देते हैं। यह एक ऐसा संग्रह है जो आपको पुरानी यादों में ले जाएगा और आपके चेहरे पर मुस्कान ला देगा। अमिताभ बच्चन, एक ऐसे कलाकार जिन्होंने अपनी प्रतिभा से भारतीय सिनेमा को एक नई पहचान दी। उनके गाने आज भी हर उत्सव और हर खुशी के मौके पर सुने जाते हैं। 

इस वीडियो में, हमने आपके लिए उनके कुछ सबसे प्यारे और खुशी देने वाले गानों को एक साथ प्रस्तुत किया है। ये गाने न केवल मनोरंजन करते हैं, बल्कि हमें जीवन के हर पल को खुशी से जीने की प्रेरणा भी देते हैं। तो आइये, इस संगीतमय सफर में हमारे साथ जुड़िए और अमिताभ बच्चन के इन सदाबहार गीतों का आनंद लीजिए।


00:00:05 Rang Barse Bheege Chunarwali 


Credits :

Song: Rang Barse Bheege Chunarwali
Album: Silsila
Artist: Amitabh Bachchan
Music Director: Shiv-Hari
Lyricist: Harivansh Rai Bachchan 


अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आया हो तो कृपया इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपका पसंदीदा गाना कौन सा है, और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on… ✨

snippet.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge Trailer Reaction! 🔥 Ranveer Singh | Aditya Dhar Spy Thriller | Cinemondo!
snippet.description:
Dhurandhar: The Revenge Trailer Reaction! 🔥 Ranveer Singh | Aditya Dhar Spy Thriller | Cinemondo!  The storm returns! In this Cinemondo trailer reaction, we dive into the explosive new trailer for Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the highly anticipated sequel starring Ranveer Singh and directed by Aditya Dhar. The action-packed spy thriller continues the story of Jaskirat Singh Rangi, promising bigger stakes, darker revenge, and massive cinematic spectacle.

The film also features a powerhouse cast including R. Madhavan, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, and Sara Arjun, and is set for a worldwide theatrical release on March 19, 2026.

Join the Cinemondo crew as we break down the trailer’s intense action, Ranveer Singh’s fierce performance, and the high-stakes revenge storyline that has already sparked huge buzz among fans and Bollywood stars.

Is this going to be the next massive Bollywood blockbuster? Let’s watch and react!

#DhurandharTheRevenge #Dhurandhar2 #RanveerSingh #AdityaDhar #SanjayDutt #RMadhavan #ArjunRampal #SaraArjun #Bollywood #BollywoodTrailer #TrailerReaction #MovieReaction #IndianCinema #SpyThriller #ActionMovie #Cinemondo #CinemondoPodcast #MovieFans #FilmReaction #UpcomingMovies

snippet.title: YUNG DSA - RADE RAPATE | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | PROD BY ‪@starboibeatz‬ | GULLY GANG RECORDS | 2026
snippet.description:
Stream Rade Rapate on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7CE7aGWKmQ1oqATMZkDsFf?si=3e9ee4b984764be2

“RADE RAPATE” is a raw cultural hip-hop anthem straight from the streets of Pune, Yerwada 06. Blending authentic Maharashtrian instruments with hard-hitting old school and new school hip-hop drums, YUNG DSA brings a powerful sound that represents the streets, the culture, and the hunger of coming from zero.

The track carries the fearless energy of Marathi street slang, turning a local expression into a global hip-hop statement. With aggressive flows, cultural sounds, and raw visuals, RADE RAPATE represents the voice of the underground and the pride of Pune’s hip-hop movement.

This isn’t just music - this is culture, struggle, and representation.

Representing PUNE | YERWADA 06
Representing INDIAN HIP HOP 


Audio Credits:

Artist/Lyrics/Composition: YUNG DSA 
Produced by: Starboi Beatz 
Mixing & Mastering: Pixlpxl 
Recording Studio: Headbang Studio
Engineer: Cosmodrop
A&R: Amit Ojha

snippet.title: #Jukebox |💔झूल्लूर दादा तान्या झा के Top 12 बेवफ़ाई नग़में |💔फनकार - झुल्लुर दादा |( 💔दर्द भरे गाने 💔)
snippet.description:
#Jukebox |💔झूल्लूर दादा तान्या झा के Top 12 बेवफ़ाई नग़में |💔फनकार - झुल्लुर दादा |( 💔दर्द भरे गाने 💔)


1 - बाहों में भर के हम तुमको मदहोश बनाने वाले हैं 
2 - मासूम अदा अंदाज़ नया 
3 - तुम मेरे बाद मोहब्बत को तरस 
4 - प्यार में जीयेंगे मर जायेंगे 
5 - यारी में कौन क्या है 
6 - जिस रस्ते से तू गुजरे वो फूलों से 
7 - साथिया नहीं जाना कि जी ना लगे 
8 - ये मुखड़ा चाँद का टुकड़ा

روسیه و آمریکا - ابرقدرت‌های جهان با هم برخورد می‌کنند! 🇺🇸 در مقابل 🇷🇺 شبیه‌سازی نهایی Arma 3 Milsim را با تانک‌های T-90M، A-10 Warthogs و F-22 Raptor تجربه کنید. نگاهی استراتژیک به تاکتیک‌های جنگ مدرن، زره سنگین و برتری هوایی با کیفیت 4K.

چه کسی در این درگیری تمام عیار پیروز می‌شود؟ تحلیل خود را در قسمت نظرات بنویسید! 👇

🔥 نکات برجسته:

حمله زرهی روسیه (T-90M)
حملات هوایی آمریکا (F-22 و A-10)
گیم‌پلی فوق العاده واقع‌گرایانه 4K

⚠️ سلب مسئولیت: شبیه‌سازی تخیلی Arma 3. فقط برای سرگرمی.

#Arma3 #RussiaVsUSA #Milsim #Modern Warfare #WW3 #Combat Footage #MilitarySimulation #Army USA #RussianArmy

es-ES.title: ¡¡¡El ejército de EE. UU. ataca a Irán hoy!!! | Simulación de guerra realista ARMA 3¡EE. UU. y Rusi
es-ES.description:
¡¡¡El ejército de EE. UU. ataca a Irán hoy!!! | Simulación de guerra realista ARMA 3

¡EE. UU. y Rusia: las superpotencias mundiales se enfrentan! 🇺🇸 vs. 🇷🇺 Experimenta la simulación definitiva de Arma 3 Milsim con tanques T-90M, A-10 Warthog y F-22 Raptor. Una mirada estratégica a las tácticas de guerra modernas, blindados pesados ​​y superioridad aérea en 4K.

¿Quién ganará este conflicto a gran escala? ¡Deja un comentario con tu análisis! 👇

🔥 DESTACADOS:

Ofensiva blindada rusa (T-90M)
Ataques aéreos estadounidenses (F-22 y A-10)
Jugabilidad ultrarrealista en 4K

⚠️ AVISO LEGAL: Simulación ficticia de Arma 3. Solo para entretenimiento.

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.description:
Nagpuri Gaana Originals proudly presents the official full video song of “Pani Ke Gagriya 2” in association with @Deeplofiofficial .

Create Reels - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1851186212267618?igsh=MW44ZWdxN2g5eXF1Zg==

अगर आपको गाना पसंद आए तो 👍 Like करें, Share करें और Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें।
अपना प्यार और आशीर्वाद ऐसे ही बनाए रखें 🙏

tere re husun na gere sab aade mummy daddy tere dono karigar thaade (2)

saara soda pure haee kuch na farod leri

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri 
nakhare karod leri….

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

gore gore mukhade pe LV ka chashma 
kaale peele laal Suit pahare saare fasama(2)
Ajay hooda kare ke taareef ra teri
Beauty aale world wide saare tu record leri
40….40….40….40…..40
40 kilo kee tu sari 100 kilo kee marod leri
thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

महाकाल - महाकाल को भगवान शंकर का दशावतारों में से प्रथम अवतार माना है। इस अवतार में भगवान शिव ने दूषण नामक असुर का वध किया था और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता महाकाली हैं।
तारकेश्वर - तारकेश्वर या तार भगवान शिव का दूसरा अवतार है और इस अवतार की शक्ति तारा देवी हैं। इस अवतार में भगवान शिव ने तारकासुर को उस समय दर्शन दिए थे जब वह शिवपुत्र कार्तिकेय द्वारा परास्त होकर मृत्यु की प्रतीक्षा कर रहा था।
बाल भुवनेश - बाल भुवनेश को शिव का तीसरा अवतार माना जाता है और इस अवतार की शक्ति बाला भुवनेशा हैं।
षोडश विद्येश - षोडश विद्येश को भगवान शंकर का चौथा अवतार माना जाता है और इस अवतार की शक्ति षोडशा विद्येशा माना जाता है।
भैरवनाथ - भैरव या भैरवनाथ को भगवान शिव का पांचवा अवतार माना जाता है। इस अवतार में भगवान शिव ने अंधकासुर नामक दैत्य का वध किया था और इस अवतार की शक्ति भैरवी हैं।
छिन्नमस्तक - छिन्नमस्तक भगवान शिव का छठा अवतार माना जाता है। यह अवतार शीश रहित अवतार है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता छिन्नमस्ता को माना जाता है।
द्युम्वान - द्युम्वान भगवान शंकर का सातवाँ अवतार माना जाता है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता द्युमावती मानी जाती हैं।
बगलामुख - बगलामुख भगवान शिव का आठवाँ अवतार है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता बगलामुखी मानी जाती हैं।
मातंग - मातंग भगवान शंकर का नौवां अवतार है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता मातंगी मानी जाती हैं। इस अवतार में ब्रह्मदेव के सभी गुण मौजूद हैं।
कमल - कमल भगवान शंकर का दसवां और अंतिम अवतार माना जाता है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता कमला मानी जाती हैं। इस अवतार में भगवान विष्णु के सभी गुण मौजूद हैं।

छिन्नमस्तक - छिन्नमस्तक भगवान शिव का छठा अवतार माना जाता है। यह अवतार शीश रहित अवतार है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता छिन्नमस्ता को माना जाता है।
द्युम्वान - द्युम्वान भगवान शंकर का सातवाँ अवतार माना जाता है और इस अवतार की शक्ति माता द्युमावती मानी जाती हैं।
